data.text/markdown:
Stargazer — scRNA-seq Explorer

Walk through the single-cell clustering pipeline step by step. Each section runs a Stargazer task and visualizes the result. Adjust parameters with the controls and re-run cells to iterate.

data.text/html: <marimo-ui-element object-id='MJUe-0' random-id='1546362d-83a6-831d-8f2b-300e97f6661e'><marimo-table data-initial-value='[]' data-label='"<span class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">All registered tasks and workflows</span></span>"' data-data='"[{\"name\":\"samtools_faidx\",\"description\":\"Create a FASTA index (.fai file) using samtools faidx.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"create_sequence_dictionary\",\"description\":\"Create a sequence dictionary (.dict file) using GATK CreateSequenceDictionary.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"bwa_index\",\"description\":\"Create BWA index files for a reference genome using bwa index.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"bwa_mem\",\"description\":\"Align FASTQ reads to reference genome using BWA-MEM.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference, r1: R1, r2: R2 | NoneType, read_group: dict[str, str] | NoneType\"},{\"name\":\"bwa_mem2_index\",\"description\":\"Create BWA-MEM2 index files for a reference genome.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"bwa_mem2_mem\",\"description\":\"Align FASTQ reads to reference genome using BWA-MEM2.\",\"params\":\"ref: Reference, r1: R1, r2: R2 | NoneType, read_group: dict[str, str] | NoneType\"},{\"name\":\"sort_sam\",\"description\":\"Sort a SAM/BAM file.\",\"params\":\"alignment: Alignment, sort_order: str\"},{\"name\":\"mark_duplicates\",\"description\":\"Mark duplicate reads in a BAM file.\",\"params\":\"alignment: Alignment\"},{\"name\":\"merge_bam_alignment\",\"description\":\"Merge alignment data from aligned BAM with data in unmapped BAM.\",\"params\":\"aligned_bam: Alignment, unmapped_bam: Alignment, ref: Reference\"},{\"name\":\"index_feature_file\",\"description\":\"Index a VCF file using GATK IndexFeatureFile.\",\"params\":\"known_sites: KnownSites\"}]"' data-total-rows='22' data-total-columns='3' data-max-columns='50' data-banner-text='""' data-pagination='true' data-page-size='10' data-show-filters='false' data-show-download='true' data-show-column-summaries='true' data-show-data-types='true' data-show-page-size-selector='true' data-show-column-explorer='true' data-show-chart-builder='true' data-row-headers='[]' data-has-stable-row-id='false' data-lazy='false' data-preload='false' data-download-file-name='"_cell_MJUe_task_rows"'></marimo-table></marimo-ui-element>

<marimo-ui-element object-id='vblA-0' random-id='63ee85c4-3fe2-b3db-98d4-557778b00756'><marimo-text data-initial-value='"s1d1"' data-label='"<span class=\"markdown prose dark:prose-invert contents\"><span class=\"paragraph\">Sample ID</span></span>"' data-placeholder='""' data-kind='"text"' data-full-width='false' data-disabled='false' data-debounce='true'></marimo-text></marimo-ui-element>

data.text/markdown: Loaded s1d1: 8,785 cells, 36,601 genes
After QC: 6,307 cells, 21,675 genes (removed -6,307 cells)

data.text/markdown:
Summary

Metric Value
Sample s1d1
Organism mouse
Final cells 6,307
Final genes 21,675
Clusters 14
Output CID local_d58eb6759d6e3a6c20e4b8b423a3bc31
The annotated AnnData is stored locally and can be loaded directly for downstream analysis: 
import scanpy as sc
ad = sc.read_h5ad("/home/ubuntu/.stargazer/local/markers.h5ad")
